title: KOMSCO OpenShift RCA Runbook
heading: Pod OOMKilled and memory limit triage
text: Use pod status, previous container logs, restart counters, memory working set, and configured memory limits. Safe checks are get pod yaml, describe pod, previous logs, and Prometheus memory queries. Do not restart, scale, patch, or delete resources during RCA.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift RCA Runbook
heading: CrashLoopBackOff restart analysis
text: Correlate restart count, waiting reason, last terminated reason, previous logs, and recent Warning events. Check probe failures, dependency errors, image entrypoint errors, and configuration mount failures before recommending any action.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift RCA Runbook
heading: Pending Pod and FailedScheduling triage
text: Inspect Warning events for FailedScheduling, resource requests, namespace quota, node taints, node selectors, affinity, and available node capacity. Keep checks read-only and separate safe observation from remediation.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift RCA Runbook
heading: ImagePullBackOff and registry access triage
section_path_label: Workloads > Image pull > Registry or secret
text: Use pod events to distinguish missing image, registry connectivity, authentication, image pull secret, and tag errors. Check image reference, service account imagePullSecrets, and recent registry operator status.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift Cluster Runbook
heading: ClusterVersion and operator condition review
text: Summarize desired version, Available, Progressing, and Degraded conditions. If Progressing or Degraded is true, inspect related ClusterOperator conditions and recent cluster events before judging update risk.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift RCA Runbook
heading: Readiness and liveness probe failure triage
text: Compare probe failure events with pod logs, service endpoints, application port configuration, container startup time, and dependency availability. Keep recommendations as checks until the owner confirms intent.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift Network Runbook
heading: DNS and NetworkPolicy connectivity triage
text: Check service endpoints, DNS operator signals, route or ingress events, network policy selectors, and namespace isolation. Use read-only console links and observations before any policy change.

title: KOMSCO OpenShift Storage Runbook
heading: PVC, mount, attach, and detach triage
section_path_label: Storage > PVC or volume mount failure
text: Inspect PVC phase, bound PV, storage class, pod volume mount events, attach detach controller events, and node availability. Report missing storage evidence explicitly when permissions or metrics are unavailable.
